name: video-capture-mcp
description: MCP server for macOS, iOS Simulator, and Android screen recording with frame extraction.

tools.name: start_recording
tools.description: Start recording macOS, iOS Simulator, or Android.

tools.name: start_app_window_recording
tools.description: Record the visible front-window region of a macOS app.

tools.name: get_window_region
tools.description: Measure visible front-window bounds for a macOS app.

tools.name: hover_sequence
tools.description: Move the macOS pointer through hover points without clicking.

tools.name: move_pointer
tools.description: Move the macOS pointer once without clicking.

tools.name: extract_frames
tools.description: Extract PNG frames from a video with scene or fixed-fps mode.

tools.name: record_and_extract
tools.description: Record a target and extract frames in one call.

tools.name: cleanup_stale_processes
tools.description: Clean up stale recordings from dead previous server processes.

tools.name: check_macos_permissions
tools.description: Diagnose macOS Screen Recording permission and Claude Code/Codex setup guidance.
